issues.details: File .eds-migration/state/block-inventory.json does not exist on branch migration-state/c31b35fb. The orchestrator requires this file as a deliverable of the Phase 2b block-inventory sub-phase.
issues.remediation: Run the block-inventory agent sub-phase to produce .eds-migration/state/block-inventory.json before proceeding to downstream phases.

issues.details: File .eds-migration/state/docs/phase2b-block-inventory.md does not exist on branch migration-state/c31b35fb. Only phase1-discovery.md is present under docs/.
issues.remediation: The block-inventory agent sub-phase must also write .eds-migration/state/docs/phase2b-block-inventory.md documenting the block inventory findings.

minimum_page_count.detail: manifest.json contains 14 canonical pages (threshold: 10). Additionally 54 dynamic clinic-detail pages are tracked in stats.

url_spot_check.detail: Spot-checked 3 URLs directly via curl: https://www.juvederm.nl/ → 200, https://www.juvederm.nl/nl/treatment/lips → 200, https://www.juvederm.nl/nl/qa → 200. All return real pages with no redirect to login wall or error page.

sitemap_cross_check.detail: Sitemap at https://www.juvederm.nl/sitemap.xml has 13 URLs; manifest has 14 (manifest includes /nl/algemene-voorwaarden-kliniekzoeker which is absent from sitemap but resolves HTTP 200). Difference is <20% and manifest actually has MORE URLs than sitemap — no truncation detected.

archetype_categorization.detail: All 8 archetypes are internally coherent: treatment-page URLs all follow /nl/treatment/{area}, clinic-finder groups /find-a-clinic + /clinics + /clinic shell pages, legal groups disclaimer + T&Cs, faq/contact/locale-root are single-page archetypes appropriately categorized.

nav_section_coverage.detail: All primary nav and footer sections are covered: treatment links → treatment-page archetype, FAQ anchor links → faq archetype, Vind je kliniek → clinic-finder, Neem contact op → contact, social media disclaimer + algemene voorwaarden → legal. No orphaned nav sections detected.

priority_assignments.detail: Homepage ('high') and locale-root ('high') are correctly top-priority. Treatment pages ('high') are core content warranting high priority. FAQ and contact are 'medium'. Legal/utility pages and the empty clinic shell are 'low'. Assignments are logical.

samples_directory_intact.detail: samples/ directory is intact from Phase 2a with 8 files: clinic-finder.json, contact.json, faq.json, homepage.json, legal.json, locale-root.json, samples-summary.json, treatment-page.json. All files have valid JSON with expected keys (archetype, bodyClasses, etc.).

analysis_directory_intact.detail: analysis/ directory has 7 archetype subdirectories each with a slug subfolder: clinic-finder/nl_find-a-clinic, contact/nl_contact-us, faq/nl_qa, homepage/index, legal/nl_disclaimer, locale-root/nl, treatment-page/nl_treatment_lips.

block_inventory_exists.detail: .eds-migration/state/block-inventory.json does not exist on branch migration-state/c31b35fb.

phase2b_doc_exists.detail: .eds-migration/state/docs/phase2b-block-inventory.md does not exist. Only phase1-discovery.md is present under docs/.

summary: FAIL — block-inventory.json and phase2b-block-inventory.md are missing (Phase 2b block-inventory sub-phase has not run); all core crawler checks (page count, URL spot-check, sitemap cross-check, archetype categorization, nav coverage, priorities) PASS and samples/ is intact from Phase 2a
